description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest Docker image with a docker:dind service. Define a single stage called build and a job named job1 that runs in the build stage on runners tagged docker. The job executes the exact commands: docker build -t taisun/dyndns:$CI_BUILD_REF ., docker tag taisun/dyndns:$CI_BUILD_REF taisun/dyndns:latest, echo $DOCKERPASS | docker login -u taisun --password-stdin, docker push taisun/dyndns:$CI_BUILD_REF, and docker push taisun/dyndns:latest. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined, and the job runs on any branch.
